ingress_contract_exists.evidence: All declared ingress surfaces have explicit contracts. signal_queue has SQL contract (lcs_signal_queue.schema.sql) and TypeScript types. Signal intake step (01-signal-intake.ts) exists. Pipeline adapters exist with StateCsvSourceAdapter base class. Ingest entry point (pipeline/ingest.js) exists.

egress_contract_exists.evidence: All declared egress surfaces have contracts. Adapter layer (src/app/lcs/adapters/) has type contracts (types.ts). CET event log (lcs.event) has SQL contract (lcs_event.schema.sql). Signal bridge (signal-bridge.ts) exists. MID delivery writes to lcs.mid_sequence_state (contract: lcs_mid_sequence_state.schema.sql) and logs to lcs.event.

no_orphan_tables.evidence: All 3 new tables have producing and consuming processes declared. lcs.cid is produced by CID compiler, consumed by SID worker. lcs.sid_output is produced by SID worker, consumed by MID engine. lcs.mid_sequence_state is produced by MID engine, consumed by monitoring/query egress.

no_unconsumed_events.evidence: MID engine logs CET events via logCetEvent() with declared event types (DELIVERY_ATTEMPTED, DELIVERY_SUCCEEDED, DELIVERY_FAILED). All event types have existing consumers in the CET dashboard and monitoring layer. ORBT errors logged via logErr0() feed into the existing err0 → ORBT strike protocol. No new event types introduced without consumers.

id_propagation_intact.evidence: Sovereign IDs propagate through the full pipeline: sovereign_company_id flows from signal_queue → CID (stored) → SID worker (read from CID) → MID engine (read from CID) → CET event (logged). communication_id flows: CID compiler (minted) → lcs.cid (PK) → SID worker (by-value ref) → lcs.sid_output → MID engine (by-value ref) → lcs.mid_sequence_state → CET event. message_run_id flows: MID engine (minted) → lcs.mid_sequence_state → CET event. No ID breaks in the chain.

id_chains.chain: signal_queue → lcs.cid → sid_worker (reads cid) → mid_engine (reads cid) → lcs.event
